name: Voicemail — record on no answer
description: An inbound call rings an internal extension that never answers; the platform's voicemail service answers, the caller leaves a message that is stored as a Voicemail Object, and the call ends normally. VoicemailReceived is emitted on the same correlation_id as the Call, and a message-waiting indication is subsequently pushed to the mailbox.

steps.note: The dialled extension does not pick up within the answer timeout; the platform's voicemail service answers in its place.
The caller's audio is captured as-is and stored as a VOICEMAIL Object referenced by URI (CMOS-07-SIP-044); a Voicemail entity links it to the mailbox and the Call.

illegal.reason: An answered call (by voicemail) cannot return to RINGING.
